temporal_description: A wide, static shot reveals a long, dark wooden trestle bridge at night. The bridge is illuminated from below, casting a pale, eerie light on the wooden planks and railings. In the background, the silhouettes of a dense forest are visible against a dark, cloudy sky. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a high-stakes confrontation. It begins with a loud, echoing, and metallic clang, as if a heavy object has been struck or dropped, immediately followed by a high-pitched, piercing, and magical-sounding shriek. The camera cuts to a medium shot of two men running frantically along the bridge. The man in the foreground, with dark hair and wearing a patterned sweater, looks back over his shoulder with a panicked expression. The man behind him is slightly out of focus. The bridge's railing and the dark, wooded background are visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right. The camera angle shifts to a close-up, following the two men as they continue to run. The man in the foreground, now more in focus, is still looking back in terror. The man behind him is a blur of motion. The scene is dark and filled with a sense of urgency. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The scene is filled with the sounds of frantic movement, including the thudding of feet on a wooden surface and the rapid, percussive clatter of what sounds like small objects being thrown or falling. The camera moves erratically, shaking as it captures the men's panicked retreat. The man in the foreground, now looking directly at the camera with a wide-eyed, fearful expression, is the central focus. The background is a blur of the dark bridge and railing. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner. The overall atmosphere is one of panic, action, and supernatural conflict, with no dialogue present.
